options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Show which database would be dropped, but don't drop it.

options.name: --connection
options.description: The connection string to the database. Defaults to the one specified in AddDbContext or OnConfiguring.

options.name: --context
options.description: The DbContext to use. "*" can be used to run the command for all contexts found. This will also disable service discovery through the startup project if a corresponding IDesignTimeDbContextFactory implementation is found.

options.name: --project
options.description: The project to use. Defaults to the current working directory.

options.name: --startup-project
options.description: The startup project to use. Defaults to the current working directory.

options.name: --framework
options.description: The target framework. Defaults to the first one in the project.

options.name: --no-build
options.description: Don't build the project. Intended to be used when the build is up-to-date.

commands.name: update
commands.description:
Updates the database to a specified migration.
Use "database [command] --help" for more information about a command.

options.name: --connection
options.description: The connection string to the database. Defaults to the one specified in AddDbContext or OnConfiguring.

options.name: --add
options.description: Create a new migration with the given name and apply it immediately.

options.name: --output-dir
options.description: The directory to put files in. Paths are relative to the project directory. Defaults to "Migrations".

options.name: --namespace
options.description: The namespace to use. Matches the directory by default.

options.name: --json
options.description: Show JSON output. Use with --prefix-output to parse programmatically.

options.name: --context
options.description: The DbContext to use. "*" can be used to run the command for all contexts found. This will also disable service discovery through the startup project if a corresponding IDesignTimeDbContextFactory implementation is found.

options.name: --project
options.description: The project to use. Defaults to the current working directory.

options.name: --startup-project
options.description: The startup project to use. Defaults to the current working directory.

options.name: --framework
options.description: The target framework. Defaults to the first one in the project.

options.name: --no-build
options.description: Don't build the project. Intended to be used when the build is up-to-date.

arguments.name: MIGRATION
arguments.description: The target migration. If '0', all migrations will be reverted. Defaults to the last migration.

commands.name: scaffold
commands.description: Scaffolds a DbContext and entity types for a database.

options.name: --data-annotations
options.description: Use attributes to configure the model (where possible). If omitted, only the fluent API is used.

options.name: --context
options.description: The name of the DbContext. Defaults to the database name.

options.name: --context-dir
options.description: The directory to put the DbContext file in. Paths are relative to the project directory.

options.name: --output-dir
options.description: The directory to put files in. Paths are relative to the project directory.

options.name: --schema
options.description: The schemas of tables and views to generate entity types for. All tables and views in the schemas will be included in the model, even if they are not explicitly included with the --table parameter.

options.name: --table
options.description: The tables and views to generate entity types for. Tables or views in a specific schema can be included using the 'schema.table' or 'schema.view' format.

options.name: --use-database-names
options.description: Use table, view, sequence, and column names directly from the database.

options.name: --json
options.description: Show JSON output. Use with --prefix-output to parse programmatically.

options.name: --namespace
options.description: The namespace to use. Matches the directory by default.

options.name: --context-namespace
options.description: The namespace of the DbContext class. Matches the directory by default.

options.name: --project
options.description: The project to use. Defaults to the current working directory.

options.name: --startup-project
options.description: The startup project to use. Defaults to the current working directory.

options.name: --framework
options.description: The target framework. Defaults to the first one in the project.

options.name: --no-build
options.description: Don't build the project. Intended to be used when the build is up-to-date.

arguments.name: CONNECTION
arguments.description: The connection string to the database.

commands.name: script
commands.description:
Generates a SQL script from migrations.
Use "migrations [command] --help" for more information about a command.

options.name: --output
options.description: The file to write the result to.

options.name: --idempotent
options.description: Generate a script that can be used on a database at any migration.

options.name: --context
options.description: The DbContext to use. "*" can be used to run the command for all contexts found. This will also disable service discovery through the startup project if a corresponding IDesignTimeDbContextFactory implementation is found.

options.name: --project
options.description: The project to use. Defaults to the current working directory.

options.name: --startup-project
options.description: The startup project to use. Defaults to the current working directory.

options.name: --framework
options.description: The target framework. Defaults to the first one in the project.

options.name: --no-build
options.description: Don't build the project. Intended to be used when the build is up-to-date.

arguments.name: FROM
arguments.description: The starting migration. Defaults to '0' (the initial database).

arguments.name: TO
arguments.description: The target migration. Defaults to the last migration.
